content_of_post_to_comment: Sweetheart, if the sun can return after the storm, so can you. Not because the storm wasn’t real. Not because it didn’t leave damage behind. But because storms were never meant to last forever. Neither were your hardest days. You are allowed to rise again. And again. And again.
comment: I wonder if part of healing is accepting that the 'sun' that returns isn’t the same one from before the storm. Sometimes recovery looks less like restoration and more like becoming someone shaped by the damage.
